code:
fn validate_age(_ age: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  if age < 0
    Err("negative")
  else if age > 150
    Err("too-large")
  else
    Ok(age)
  end
end

fn show(_ r: Result<Int, String>) -> Unit
  match r
  when Ok(age)
    print("ok=#{age}")
  when Err(msg)
    print("err=#{msg}")
  end
end

show(validate_age(-1))
show(validate_age(25))
show(validate_age(200))
